H2-security-headers.description: Missing security response headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options)

H1-https-downgrade.description: HTTPS to HTTP downgrade redirect + misconfigured trusted proxies

M1-null-byte.description: Null byte in login email causes 500 Internal Server Error

M2-timing-oracle.description: Timing side-channel on login enables account enumeration

M3-body-size.description: No request body size limit - 10MB payloads accepted on all endpoints

M5-health-disclosure.description: Health endpoint discloses version, infra details, and worker states without auth

L1-api-hardening.description: Minor API hardening: SSE 422 to 401, CORS wildcards, Pydantic detail leakage

C1-approval-race.description: Expired approvals can be approved during race window between logical expiry and timeout worker

C2-unsigned-sessions.description: Sessions stored unsigned in Redis - EDICTUM_SECRET_KEY required but never used

H1-webhook-security.description: Telegram webhook secret comparison not timing-safe + webhook endpoints missing tenant filters

H6-server-hardening.description: Server hardening: uvicorn limits, DB pool config, Docker network isolation

M4-ssrf.description: SSRF bypass in notification channel test + AI provider base_url

M6-rate-limiting.description: Rate limiting gaps: per-tenant SSE, per-email login, setup endpoint, atomic ops

M10-encryption.description: Encryption: plaintext config fallback + signing key reused for multiple purposes

M13-pagination.description: Unbounded list endpoints + approval offset pagination

L6-input-validation.description: Input validation: email validation, Telegram HTML injection, null bytes

L7-dependency-pinning.description: Dependency pinning: no lock file for Python dependencies
